title: enneapogon cylindricus
intro: Enneapogon cylindricus, also known as the cylinder grass or cylindrical grass, is a species of grass in the family Poaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory problems. Enneapogon cylindricus is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and its dried leaves can be used to make herbal remedies, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
